news_items.title: Algeria vs Austria Lineups, Starting 11, Bench & Formation | FWC Times
news_items.author: Samule
news_items.text:
Algeria vs Austria Lineups, Starting 11, Bench & Formation | FWC Times

GROUP J · MATCH 69 · LINEUPS

ALGERIA

FIFA #28 · Projected

22:00

ET · 27 JUN 2026

Kansas City Stadium(Kansas City)

AUSTRIA

FIFA #22 · Projected

Live ScorePreviewPredictionLineupsHead 2 HeadLive StreamStats

Algeria vs Austria lineups are yet to be confirmed for Group J Match 69 at the FIFA World Cup 2026. The Algeria national football team and Austria national football team meet on June 27, 2026, at Kansas City Stadium, with kickoff at 22:00 ET. This projected lineup tracker covers the starting XI, formations, bench options, managers, and late matchday updates. This Algeria national football team vs Austria national football team lineups tracker stays projected until official match sheets arrive.

FIFA lists Algeria vs Austria as Group J Match 69 at Kansas City Stadium, with kickoff at 02:00 UTC on 28 June. Ticket and venue listings place the local kickoff at 9:00 PM in Kansas City on June 27. Algeria are working under Vladimir Petkovic, while Austria continue under Ralf Rangnick after using a high-pressing base in Group J. Official matchday lineups remain projected until both teams release their sheets.

news_items.title: Algeria vs Austria FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com
news_items.author: James Freemantle
news_items.text:
Algeria vs Austria FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com

WATCH SECURELY FROM ANYWHERE

Jun 23, 2026 20:22+02:00

TV Guide & Streaming

World Cup

Austria

Algeria

R. Mahrez

Comprehensive match preview of Algeria vs Austria at World Cup 2026. We talk tactics, team news and more.

World Cup - Grp. J

Kansas City Stadium

Algeria vs Austria will kick off on 27 Jun 2026 at 22:00 EST.

### Match context

It's a straight shootout for a guaranteed round of 32 berth between Algeria and Austria in World Cup Group J, with Argentina already sealing top spot in the section.

Getty Images

### The World Cup story so far

Algeria have stormed back to beat Jordan 2-1 and eliminate the World Cup debutants with a match to spare thanks to second-half goals ⁠from substitute Nadhir Benbouali and Amine Gouiri.

Benbouali’s header cancelled out Nizar Al-Rashdan’s first-half opener, and Gouiri poked home in a goalmouth scramble eight minutes from time to keep Algeria’s knockout hopes alive after a 3-0 loss ⁠to Argentina. Legendary figure Riyad Mahrez was on the bench against the Argentines but started the win over Jordan and should keep his place for this crunch clash.

G

Algeria vs Austria lineups are yet to be confirmed for Group J Match 69 at the FIFA World Cup 2026. The Algeria national football team and Austria national football team meet on June 27, 2026, at Kansas City Stadium, with kickoff at 22:00 ET. This projected lineup tracker covers the starting XI, formations, bench options, managers, and late matchday updates. This Algeria national football team vs Austria national football team lineups tracker stays projected until official match sheets arrive.

FIFA lists Algeria vs Austria as Group J Match 69 at Kansas City Stadium, with kickoff at 02:00 UTC on 28 June. Ticket and venue listings place the local kickoff at 9:00 PM in Kansas City on June 27. Algeria are working under Vladimir Petkovic, while Austria continue under Ralf Rangnick after using a high-pressing base in Group J. Official matchday lineups remain projected until both teams release their sheets."}

{"title": "Algeria vs Austria FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com", "url": "https://www.goal.com/en/news/algeria-austria-world-cup-preview/bltd61a8ee4bb405624", "publishedDate": "2026-06-23T18:22:51.000Z", "author": "James Freemantle", "text": "Algeria vs Austria FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com

WATCH SECURELY FROM ANYWHERE

Jun 23, 2026 20:22+02:00

TV Guide & Streaming

World Cup

Austria

Algeria

R. Mahrez

Comprehensive match preview of Algeria vs Austria at World Cup 2026. We talk tactics, team news and more.

World Cup - Grp. J

Kansas City Stadium

Algeria vs Austria will kick off on 27 Jun 2026 at 22:00 EST.

### Match context

It's a straight shootout for a guaranteed round of 32 berth between Algeria and Austria in World Cup Group J, with Argentina already sealing top spot in the section.

Getty Images

### The World Cup story so far

Algeria have stormed back to beat Jordan 2-1 and eliminate the World Cup debutants with a match to spare thanks to second-half goals ⁠from substitute Nadhir Benbouali and Amine Gouiri.

Benbouali’s header cancelled out Nizar Al-Rashdan’s first-half opener, and Gouiri poked home in a goalmouth scramble eight minutes from time to keep Algeria’s knockout hopes alive after a 3-0 loss ⁠to Argentina. Legendary figure Riyad Mahrez was on the bench against the Argentines but started the win over Jordan and should keep his place for this crunch clash.
